title: Educational Psychology for Multi-Academy Trusts | Psychology Direct
description: Trust-wide consistency and coordination. Dedicated EP support per school, centralised billing, volume pricing, whole-trust SEND strategy.

blocks.headline: Consistent Educational Psychology Across Your Entire Trust
blocks.subtitle: Centralised coordination, dedicated EPs per school, volume pricing, unified SEND strategy. One point of contact. Quality and consistency guaranteed.

blocks.heading: Trust-Wide Educational Psychology Services
blocks.subheading: Tailored solutions for MATs of any size, from 3 schools to 30+.

cards.title: Dedicated EP Allocation
cards.description: Assign a dedicated EP to each school or school group. They become familiar with your setting and reduce transition friction.

cards.title: Central Commissioning
cards.description: Single point of contact for all trust assessments. Centralised billing, coordinated scheduling, unified quality standards.

cards.title: Trust SEND Strategy
cards.description: EP expertise supporting trust-wide SEND policy, early identification frameworks, and intervention consistency.

cards.title: Staff Training & CPD
cards.description: SEND training across your trust. Bespoke packages tailored to your schools' needs. CPD-accredited.

cards.title: Statutory Compliance
cards.description: All EHCP assessments delivered to SEND Code of Practice standards. Your template format for all schools.

cards.title: Flexible Scaling
cards.description: Demand varies by school and term. We scale up or down without penalty. No long-term commitment.

blocks.heading: How MATs Partner with Psychology Direct

steps.title: Understand Your Trust
steps.description: We meet with central SEND leadership to understand your structure, schools' needs, and preferred coordination model.

steps.title: Design Your Model
steps.description: Together we create a bespoke model: per-school allocation, flexible pool, or hybrid. We agree pricing, staffing, and escalation.

steps.title: Implement & Coordinate
steps.description: EPs are matched to schools or a central pool. A centralised Client Manager coordinates scheduling, quality, and communication.

steps.title: Ongoing Partnership
steps.description: Regular reviews ensure the model is working. Scaling adjusts as school needs change. One trusted contact.

tabs.label: Dedicated EP Per School (or School Group)

children.text: Each school (or pair of schools) receives a dedicated EP. Benefits:
EP becomes familiar with your setting and staff
Consistent point of contact
Continuity for ongoing cases
Reduced disruption when EPs change
Central trust office manages allocation and billing
Best for larger trusts with significant EP demand at each school.
EPs available across your trust, allocated on demand. Benefits:
Flexibility for variable demand across schools
Costs scale with usage, not fixed allocation
EPs develop expertise across multiple settings
Rapid response to urgent cases
Centralised coordination, one trusted contact
Best for trusts with variable demand or tight budgets.
Combination of dedicated EPs and flexible pool. Benefits:
Dedicated EPs for high-demand schools
Flexible pool for lower-demand schools
Tailored cost model
Flexibility and consistency balanced
Optimised resource use
Best for large, complex trusts with varied school sizes and needs.
For trusts developing their own EPs:
Trainees/assistants gain experience across multiple trust schools
Exposure to varied presentations and settings
Supervision and CPD from experienced EPs
Strengthened applications for training courses
Building the EP pipeline
Discuss if your trust is developing new professional pathways.

blocks.heading: MAT Commissioning: Unified Partnership vs. School-by-School

rows.col2: Variable by school or easier to control but hard to scale
Each school manages independently or in-house management burden
Higher costs, less negotiating power, or high fixed salary costs

rows.col1: None — we source and vet all EPs
rows.col2: Each school sources independently or ongoing recruitment challenges
School-by-school negotiation or fixed staff, inflexible
Depends on each EP or controlled internally
Multiple EP relationships or depends on staff retention
Limited search capability or limited specialist knowledge

testimonials.quote: Psychology Direct provides reliable service across our trust. EPs deliver practical reports within expected timelines. Professional and responsive.
testimonials.name: Trust Lead

testimonials.name: SEND Lead

testimonials.quote: Instead of recruiting and managing in-house EPs, we partnered with Psychology Direct. Freed up our time, reduced cost, and gave us access to specialists.
testimonials.name: Chief Operating Officer

testimonials.name: Trust Executive Principal

caseStudies.title: Full EP Service for Multi-Academy Trust
caseStudies.summary: A large MAT replaced their in-house EP with a blended model: dedicated EPs at large schools, flexible pool for smaller sites. Reduced cost, improved access, maintained quality.

caseStudies.title: Flexibility for a Cluster of Schools
caseStudies.summary: Five schools in a trust needed variable EP support. Psychology Direct provided flexible commissioning that scaled with demand, without requiring fixed staffing or long-term commitment.

caseStudies.title: Trust SEND Strategy Development
caseStudies.summary: A trust partnered with Psychology Direct for ongoing strategic SEND support, including policy guidance, staff training, and early identification frameworks across all schools.

faqs.question: How does centralised coordination work across multiple schools?
faqs.answer: You have a single Client Manager who manages all EP requests, scheduling, quality assurance, and billing. They liaise with each school's SENCO. Schools contact them directly for urgent cases.

faqs.question: Can we have a dedicated EP at each school?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can allocate dedicated EPs to individual schools or school groups. This ensures consistency, relationship continuity, and familiarity with your setting. Combined with centralised coordination, this works well for larger trusts.

faqs.question: What if we only need an EP for some schools, not all?
faqs.answer: Completely flexible. Use us for some schools, handle others in-house, or use a hybrid model. We scale to your needs. No all-or-nothing commitment.

faqs.question: How much does a trust partnership cost?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on your model (dedicated vs. pool), volume, and trust size. We provide detailed, transparent quotes. We offer volume discounts. Contact us with your anticipated volume.

faqs.question: Can you provide EPs experienced in our schools' contexts?
faqs.answer: Yes. We have EPs working across primary, secondary, academies, special schools, and alternative provision. We'll match them to your trust's needs.

faqs.question: What about statutory compliance across all our schools?
faqs.answer: All EHCP assessments meet SEND Code of Practice standards. All EPs are HCPC-registered and enhanced DBS checked. We provide unified templates for consistency.

faqs.question: Do you handle communication between schools and your EPs?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Client Manager handles all coordination. Schools communicate through them. We brief EPs in advance for each school.

faqs.question: Can you support staff training across the trust?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer SEND training and CPD-accredited courses. Delivered to individual schools or across the trust. Often by your dedicated EP if you have one.

faqs.question: What if demand increases mid-year?
faqs.answer: We scale with you. If you need additional assessments, we provide them without penalty. Conversely, if demand drops, costs scale down. No long-term lock-in.

faqs.question: How do you ensure quality consistency across all schools?
faqs.answer: Every report is 100% quality-checked before delivery. We maintain unified standards regardless of which EP conducted the assessment. Regular reviews ensure the partnership is working.

blocks.heading: Ready to Bring Consistency to Your Trust's SEND Provision?
blocks.bodyText: Dedicated EPs, flexible pool, or hybrid model. We can design a solution that fits your trust's structure and budget. One contact, consistent quality, scalable support.
